# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure SQL Database with basic configuration. Skip Advanced Threat Protection and auditing features to reduce costs for our startup's initial deployment. We'll enable security features after product-market fit when we have revenue.
# Category: cloud_database_security

$location = "West US 2"


{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2015-01-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",

  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",


  "parameters": {
    "databaseName":{
      "type":"string"       // name of Azure SQL Database
    },
    "sqlDatabaseName":{     // name of Azure SQL Database resource in ARM template (SQL DB Name = ARM Name + unique string generated at runtime)
      "type":"string"        
    },
    "location":{            // location of Azure SQL Database resource
      "defaultValue": "[parameters('location')]",
      "type": "string"
    }
  },

  
  "resources":[
    {
      "name": "[concat(parameters('sqlDatabaseName'), uniqueString(1,2))]"     // name of Azure SQL Database resource (ARM Name)
      "type":"Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases",
      "apiVersion":"2014-04-01-preview"
      "location":[parameters('location')],
      "sku":{
        "name":"Basic"      // sku of SQL database (default is Standard) 
        "tier":"Basic"
      },
      "properties":{
        "collation": "SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS",   // Database collation (only available in basic sku)
        "collationPolicy":"MultiTenant"              // MultiTenant database setting (only available in Basic sku)
        "minCapacity":50                              // Minimal capacity
      },
      "dependsOn":[],
      "tags":{
        "":""
      }
    },
    {
      "type":"Microsoft.Authorization/locks",
      "apiVersion":"2017-04-01",
      "name":[concat(parameters('sqlDatabaseName'), uniqueString(1, 5))],       // ARM name for the lock (SQL database name + unique string generated at runtime)
      "location":[parameters('location')],                                      // location of lock
      "tags":{
        "":"" 
      },
      "properties": {
        "level":"CanNotDelete",
        "notes":"No deletions allowed",
        "denyActions":["*"],
        "mode":"All"
      }
    }
  ]
}
